get.description: Get a character by its id.

post.description: Create a new character for the authenticated user.
Upload or replace the character picture. Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, and JPEG.

put.description: Update a character main stats and profile information.

patch.description: Add an equipment item to the character by equipment id.
Remove an equipment item from the character and refund 90% of its value.
Add or subtract money from one of the character currency types.

delete.description: Delete a character owned by the authenticated user and remove its linked references.
